description.value:
Seastone Knife Item 11

Rare, Agile, Finesse, Seastone, Thrown 10 ft.

A slim knife with a blade of high-grade Seastone. The stone holds a wickedly sharp edge and carries a particular menace for those with Devil Fruit powers.

Sea-Bound on Hit: When you Strike a creature with the Sea-Bound trait with this weapon, the target must succeed at a DC 28 Fortitude save or become afflicted by their Sea-Bound condition (Slowed 1, Clumsy 1, archetype suppressed) for 1 round. On a critical failure, the duration is 1 minute.

The stone blade is still sharp against ordinary foes — it just doesn't have any supernatural effect on them.

Hardness 18 / HP 72 / BT 36
description.gm: The Sea-Bound on Hit effect is narrative — implement via an inline roll macro or a token effect. The module does not auto-apply timed Sea-Bound from weapon hits (only from sustained contact).
